# dependencytrack_project_metrics (Data Source)

Retrieves the most recent metrics snapshot for a project from Dependency-Track. If the server has never computed metrics for the project (typical for a freshly created project on v4), this data source triggers a metrics refresh, waits briefly for it to complete, and reports zero values if metrics are still unavailable.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "dependencytrack_project" "web_app" {
  name    = "Web Application"
  version = "1.0.0"
}

# Fetch the latest metrics snapshot of the project
data "dependencytrack_project_metrics" "web_app" {
  project = data.dependencytrack_project.web_app.id
}

output "web_app_critical_vulnerabilities" {
  value = data.dependencytrack_project_metrics.web_app.critical
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project` (String) The UUID of the project

### Read-Only

- `components` (Number) Total number of components in the project
- `critical` (Number) Number of critical severity vulnerabilities
- `findings_audited` (Number) Number of audited findings
- `findings_total` (Number) Total number of findings
- `findings_unaudited` (Number) Number of unaudited findings
- `first_occurrence` (Number) Timestamp (epoch milliseconds) when this metrics snapshot was first recorded
- `high` (Number) Number of high severity vulnerabilities
- `id` (String) Identifier of this data source result (the project UUID)
- `inherited_risk_score` (Number) The inherited risk score of the project
- `last_occurrence` (Number) Timestamp (epoch milliseconds) when this metrics snapshot was last confirmed
- `low` (Number) Number of low severity vulnerabilities
- `medium` (Number) Number of medium severity vulnerabilities
- `policy_violations_audited` (Number) Number of audited policy violations
- `policy_violations_fail` (Number) Number of policy violations with a FAIL violation state
- `policy_violations_info` (Number) Number of policy violations with an INFO violation state
- `policy_violations_license_audited` (Number) Number of audited license policy violations
- `policy_violations_license_total` (Number) Total number of license policy violations
- `policy_violations_license_unaudited` (Number) Number of unaudited license policy violations
- `policy_violations_operational_audited` (Number) Number of audited operational policy violations
- `policy_violations_operational_total` (Number) Total number of operational policy violations
- `policy_violations_operational_unaudited` (Number) Number of unaudited operational policy violations
- `policy_violations_security_audited` (Number) Number of audited security policy violations
- `policy_violations_security_total` (Number) Total number of security policy violations
- `policy_violations_security_unaudited` (Number) Number of unaudited security policy violations
- `policy_violations_total` (Number) Total number of policy violations
- `policy_violations_unaudited` (Number) Number of unaudited policy violations
- `policy_violations_warn` (Number) Number of policy violations with a WARN violation state
- `suppressed` (Number) Number of suppressed findings
- `unassigned` (Number) Number of vulnerabilities with unassigned severity
- `vulnerabilities` (Number) Total number of vulnerabilities in the project
- `vulnerable_components` (Number) Number of components with at least one vulnerability
